And the thing that's got me worried today, although I think Vivek says I shouldn't be, I think organic traffic is going to come in light for July.
And so it's the first time we've had two down months, and normally June and July,
For good months in the history of this company for web traffic, it's like, why is organic traffic going down?
And my paranoid hypothesis is maybe organic traffic, like search traffic, is going away.
Yeah.
Oh, sorry.
Yeah, I appreciate it.
I'm just grateful that we're having this conversation and that you feel, A, hopefully you do feel comfortable to bring, like, here's worst case scenario.
Please help me figure out, like, you know, how much we need to be worried about this from your perspective.
So first and foremost, thank you for having the conversation with us.
I think there are a few things in that bucket.
Vivek, I'm sure you want to talk about traffic, but in terms of geo, I know that this feels a little abstract and let me know if I'm maybe not understanding correctly.
But I think, like, what that says to me is we really need to strengthen our, like, what do we want to be absolutely 100%.
100% tied to.
What topics do we want to own as just the true authority in the space?
Because that is what will be showing up as a mention in an LLM.
So while it might feel like the organic traffic, if there is a dip, we still need to produce the content that shows an LLM that we are the most popular, most authoritative, best answer.
And so the content is what feeds into Reddit or Cura.
And obviously, there are other ways that we can strategize to get that kind of earned mention.
But I think the content that we're producing here, it might just be more of a secondary.
It might not look like looking at organic traffic, but it is the building block for the type of results that we still want.
Jackson, feel free to jump in.
Yeah, had a question about what you guys think about content repurposing on different channels by taking our own already created.

Content and then making like a medium account potentially and making different versions of things to seed it so it doesn't look like it's coming from a personal account or from a company account to try to get more citations that validate our positioning.
It's an interesting idea.
Let me ask and see if anyone has piloted this for another client.
My first instinct would be not a bad idea.
It just would have to be done in a way where it doesn't feel salesy in any way.
Yeah, that's the pitfall that we would need to be really careful of because I think if anyone.
Yeah.
Anyway, so something to think about and maybe we can spend more time on it next time because I like the idea.

But there might be a different way we could approach it, which is like a shared byline or like expert guides or something that is a little bit more we're borrowing that authority and strengthening it.
But maybe it's a little less risky, but.
Something for us to think about.
I'll ask and see if anyone is piloted something similar.
Yeah, my thought was my concern would both be content duplication and also it'd be being salesy.
And I was trying to think of ways you could validate our positioning without it feeling like an ad, but still lead people directly to our product.
So it feels like a hard nut to crack, but still.
I guess that's like a great use case for like thought leadership.
You know, it's like the, it's somewhat related, but much more gentle than something like specifically product related.
But yeah, that's a great, that's great input and something for us to think about.
But anyway, sorry, Jason, was there anything else you wanted to add or Vivek, was there anything else you wanted to add?
Well, we're over for today.
So let's, let's call it good enough.
But keep me posted on what you're learning about this tool.
And you don't have to wait three weeks to give me an update if you don't want to.
I've got my calendar link and you know that I'm paranoid about the future.
Content marketing.
Yeah.
the sooner I get a baseline, the sooner we can see if we're on the right track.
For sure.
Okay.
I hear you.
Thank you very much for your time.
We will work on establishing a baseline.
I will pass along your feedback to Scrunch specifically on like the MPS-like feature and then just some questions about how granular we can get with the data.
Vivek and I will share with you like as soon as we feel like the insights, we can get some insights.
We will share them with you.
I will also book a meeting with you three weeks from now, but if we can pull it up a little bit earlier, we will.
And we'll also not be shy about sharing what we're seeing in advance.
And then I can also work on some more like written responses to some of your concerns, just so that you have them on hand.
But I know it'll be an ongoing conversation.
Sounds like a plan.
Cool.
Thank you so much.
I really appreciate you reaching out and like giving us the opportunity to have the conversation.
AI is the future.
It's good to be part of it.
Yeah.
Yeah, totally.
It's a lot of fun to chat about, too.
Oh, yeah.
Have a good day, okay?
Yeah, you too.
Thank you so much.
Okay, bye-bye.
Talk to you soon.
Bye, everyone.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-driven content marketing approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Discrepancies in SEO ranking data between tools need investigation (SEMrush vs. Google Search Console)](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Team is implementing Scrunch for LLM-based content performance tracking; data will be more meaningful in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Concerns raised about potential decline in organic traffic and shift towards AI-driven content discovery](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Focus on strengthening Galileo's authority on key topics for better LLM mentions and citations](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Discrepancies

  - [Significant difference (5-10x) in ranking data between SEMrush and Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Team to investigate US vs. global filter impact and validate keyword lists](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Goal: Ensure SEMrush data is directionally faithful for competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Scrunch Implementation for LLM Tracking

  - [Recently onboarded Scrunch to track LLM mentions and performance](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Dashboard shows prompts, variants, responses, presence, and citations](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Team working on refining prompts to align with business objectives](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [3-4 weeks needed for meaningful data accumulation and insights](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

### Content Strategy for AI-Driven Discovery

  - [Jason expressed concerns about declining effectiveness of traditional content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)
  - [Shift focus towards comparison content and off-site publishing (Quora, Reddit, G2 Crowd)](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
  - [Team to explore content repurposing strategies for increased citations and authority](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2285.0)

### Organic Traffic Concerns

  - [Potential downward trend in organic traffic for June and July](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
  - [Team to investigate if this is related to broader shifts in search behavior](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Focus on creating authoritative content to maintain strong LLM mentions](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)

### Measuring LLM Performance

  - [Discussion on developing an NPS-like score for LLM sentiment towards Galileo](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Need for simplified metrics to summarize performance for higher-level reporting](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Apply US filter to Google Search Console data and compare with SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Refine Scrunch prompts and investigate more granular sentiment tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Explore content repurposing strategies for off-site authority building](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Develop baseline metrics for LLM performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting in 3 weeks to review initial Scrunch data and insights](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Prepare written responses to Jason's concerns about future of content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/3yxy5q1N-ZtiiJs9MnRxkKLpv2obwXzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)

action_items.description: Apply US filter to SEO reports; compare w/ SEMrush data for keyword rankings discrepancy
Fine-tune Scrunch prompts w/ Mara; ensure product eval focus, not just TOFU/info
Review list of Scrunch-tracked prompts; validate content pillars coverage
Follow up w/ Scrunch team: NPS-like feature, data granularity Qs, sentiment tracking details
Book 30min Calendly w/ Jason in 3wks for Scrunch data review/insights
